title: English Conversation Practice
youtubeTitle: English Conversation Practice | Outside Tom's House
youtubeDescription: Practice everyday English with this short conversation. Listen and read along! #shorts #learnenglish #englishconversation

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Hi Tom! How are you today?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Hi Lisa. I'm fine, but a bit worried.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh no! What happened to him?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He has a fever and a bad cough.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Did you take him to the doctor?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, we went to the doctor yesterday.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The doctor said it's the flu.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A little better, but still weak.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, he is resting in bed.
